fields.description: DE304 — ISO Country Code (FHL30: at least one of country/info-id/customs-id required)
fields.label: Country

fields.description: DE103 — Information Identifier (e.g. ISS, OSS, EXP, IMP, CUS, AGT, DCL, SHP, CNE)
fields.label: Info Identifier

fields.description: DE941 — Customs, Security & Regulatory Control Info Identifier (e.g. RA, KC, M, T, ED, SM, SN, SD, ST, SS)
fields.label: Customs Info Identifier

fields.description: DE940 — Supplementary info (continuation rows: country/info-id blank, only customs-id + supplementary filled)
fields.label: Supplementary
